textPlain: The source code is locked behind a login though. Is that intentional?Edit: just the web view is locked. Read the homepage, it tells you how to access the code (be respectful though, don't hug the site to death)

In short: it's a terminal emulator where rendering is completely run by GL ES compute shaders. It allows for GPU-accelerated  performance on low-end SBCs.Said to be very stable, runs for months, compliant enough to run Emacs with mouse support.
